chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) كُلَّهُمْ قَائِمُونَ بِأَمْرِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى هَادُونَ إِلَيْهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 128 – The Imams<sup>asws</sup>, all of them<sup>asws</sup> are establishing the Command of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Exalted, guiding to Him<sup>azwj</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/242)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/242)
text: هُ سُئِلَ عَنِ الْقَائِمِ فَقَالَ كُلُّنَا قَائِمٌ بِأَمْرِ اللَّهِ وَاحِدٌ بَعْدَ وَاحِدٍ حَتَّى يَجِي‏ءَ صَاحِبُ السَّيْفِ فَإِذَا جَاءَ صَاحِبُ السَّيْفِ جَاءَ بِأَمْرٍ غَيْرِ الَّذِي كَانَ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad Al Ashary, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Washha, from Ahmad Bin Aiz, from Abu Khadeeja,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that he<sup>asws</sup> was asked about Al-Qaim<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘All of us<sup>asws</sup> are Qaim (standing) with the Command of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, one after one, until there would come the Owner of the sword. So when the owner of the sword comes, he<sup>asws</sup> would come with a matter other than which was’.
en.sarwar: 2. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad al-Ash‘ari has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ from Ahmad ibn ‘A’idh from abu Khadija from abu ‘Abdallah who has said the following. “He said, when he was asked about Al-Qa’im, “We all Al-Qa’im ((the one who will rise with Divine Authority) with the command of Allah one after the other until the time when the owner of the sword will rise. When the owner of the sword will rise he will rise with the command other than what it was.”
